reasoning: Francesca Muñoz is no longer a candidate in the 2025 Chilean presidential election. Her pre-candidacy for the Social Christian Party was officially withdrawn by August 2025, and her party has thrown its support behind José Antonio Kast of the Republican Party. Since she will not appear on the ballot (or is functionally not running) and polls show major candidates like Jeannette Jara, José Antonio Kast, and Evelyn Matthei dominating the race, her chance of winning is zero. Therefore, I assign the minimum allowable probability of 0.02.
